scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install
scripts.test: concurrently --names "API,WEB" "npm --prefix apps/api run test" "npm --prefix apps/web run test"
scripts.test:coverage: concurrently --names "API,WEB" "npm --prefix apps/api run test:coverage" "npm --prefix apps/web run test:coverage"
